title: Vibe Title En Zero Gravity Pigment Master
sourceTitle: Vibe Title En Zero Gravity Pigment Master
prompt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Zero-Gravity Pigment",
  "master_prompt": "A hyper-realistic, high-fashion surrealist portrait of The Protagonist with a confident, piercing direct gaze. The setting is a sun-bleached, dusty artisanal pigment-grinding workshop with textured terracotta plaster walls. Hard, directional Mediterranean sunlight slices through an unseen window, casting stark, geometric shadows across the subject's face, highlighting micro-details of skin pores, natural imperfections, and a light dusting of freckles. Surreal practical effects: Floating beside the subject's ear is a large earring made entirely of zero-gravity, viscous yellow and white liquid pigment, suspended in mid-air in the perfect geometric shape of a daisy, capturing natural light refractions. Hovering just above the head is a dense, frozen halo of bright orange saffron powder, mimicking the silhouette of a beret. The subject wears striking yellow graphic eyeliner and a tightly woven, tactile earth-brown high-neck garment. Shot on Hasselblad H6D-100c with a 100mm f/2.2 lens on Kodak Portra 160. Shallow depth of field focusing on the liquid surface tension and the eye. Thick, organic dust motes dancing in the sunbeams. Analog film texture, rich warm color grading. NO NEON.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "To merge high-fashion editorial portraiture with impossible, in-camera practical effect surrealism.",
    "priorities": "Hyper-tactile skin and fabric textures, hard directional sunlight, and believable fluid physics for the floating elements.",
    "device_profile": "Medium Format Digital mimicking Analog Film"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "Portrait 4:5",
    "composition": "Close-up portrait, slightly off-center to allow space for the floating surreal elements, direct eye contact.",
    "layout": "Subject fills the frame vertically, strong diagonal shadow lines cutting across the composition.",
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level, intimate and direct.",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Female",
    "identity": "The Protagonist",
    "demographics": "Ageless, ethnically ambiguous",
    "face": "Strong bone structure, visible freckles and microscopic pore texture, striking yellow graphic eyeliner.",
    "hair": "Slicked back or tucked away to emphasize the floating headpiece.",
    "body": "Erect posture, shoulders slightly squared.",
    "expression": "Confident, unapologetic, holding a piercing gaze.",
    "pose": "Static but tension-filled, facing the camera with a slight head tilt toward the hard light."
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "High-neck top",
        "material": "Heavy tactile jacquard woven fabric",
        "color": "Earth brown",
        "fit": "Tight and structured"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Floating zero-gravity liquid daisy earring",
        "color": "Vibrant yellow and pure white",
        "material": "Viscous suspended liquid pigment",
        "brand_style": "Avant-Garde Practical Effect"
      },
      {
        "item": "Suspended halo beret",
        "color": "Bright orange",
        "material": "Dense airborne saffron powder",
        "brand_style": "Surrealist Haute Couture"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Sun-bleached artisanal pigment-grinding workshop",
    "surfaces": "Terracotta plaster, raw wood, airborne powder",
    "depth": "Shallow, with a softly blurred plastered wall in the immediate background",
    "atmosphere": "Dry, warm, thick with illuminated dust motes",
    "lens_interaction": "Sharp sunlight hitting the lens edge creating a slight organic halation"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Hard, directional sunlight from the upper left, split and Rembrandt hybrid",
    "fill": "Minimal, relying on ambient bounce from the warm terracotta walls",
    "rim": "A warm, subtle rim light catching the suspended orange powder",
    "shadows": "Deep, sharply defined geometric edges",
    "color_temperature": "Warm 5500K with a golden bias",
    "sensor_flare": "Subtle warm optical flare from the primary light source"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "Medium format prime portrait lens",
    "focal_length": "100mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.2",
    "focus": "Tack sharp on the subject's nearest eye and the surface tension of the floating liquid",
    "sensor_format": "Medium Format Hasselblad H6D-100c",
    "perspective_distortion": "None, extremely flat and flattering facial compression"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "Rich, saturated warm tones emphasizing mustard, burnt orange, and earth brown",
    "tonality": "High contrast with preserved details in the highlights",
    "texture": "Kodak Portra 160 grain, highly tactile",
    "digital_sharpening": "None, relying entirely on the optical sharpness of the medium format lens",
    "chromatic_aberration": "Faint, natural fringing only at the extreme edges of the floating liquid"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "Neon",
    "Cyberpunk",
    "Cliches",
    "Plastic skin",
    "Flat lighting",
    "Digital painting",
    "CGI feel",
    "Cartoonish proportions",
    "Smooth airbrushed textures",
    "Modern office spaces"
  ]
}
